challenge_rules.name: prop_50k_main
challenge_rules.description: 50K-style prop challenge with profit target, daily loss, and trailing drawdown.
challenge_rules.notes: Daily loss is modeled with end-of-day audited PnL and capped at the limit when the limit is hit. Trailing drawdown uses prior closed-equity high-watermark logic.

assumptions: Challenge readiness uses common OOS rolling starts only; no new alpha search is performed.
Risk profiles use a compact global exposure multiplier layered on top of the already-validated overlay behavior.
Slippage stress is applied from audited trade logs using the repo instrument tick value and nominal slippage baseline.
Funded follow-up is a light post-pass lens, not a full commercial funded-account model.
